title: build: add validation to the specified dockerfile path
body:
Make sure the path to the specified dockerfile is a file, excluding the folder.

fixes #1104 

After change:
```
➜  ~ buildah bud -f "tools/Dockerfiles" .
"tools/Dockerfiles" is a directory
ERRO[0000] exit status 1 
```

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body:
@q384566678 LGTM; though I didn't figure out how to build `buildah` from source... :) I think I'm missing a lot of dependencies that `dnf builddep buildah` didn't pull in. I'll leave the (formal) review to someone else.

But yes, thank you very much! The new error messages look nice. :)
Test issues look to be unrelated.  A number of segv's trying to deal with vfs.

@q384566678 I think there's a small regression with this. One of the initial use cases in the issue is now generating a segv...

:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 60485e6) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @q384566678 Does #1132 remove the need for this PR?

Oops, yep, #1132 replaces this.  Sorry @q384566678 , I'd forgotten you'd this one in progress and the issue didn't have anyone assigned to it.  I'm going to close this, thanks for the work @q384566678 !
